news.title: Fort Fairfield boys soccer edges Monmouth for Class D title
news.summary: After falling late in last year's state final, the Tigers take home their first Gold Ball since 2015.

news.summary: The Pirates win the 8-player state championship after coming close in 2024.

news.title: Transgender wife-beater harassed women in lady's LA gym locker room, singer Tish Hyman says
news.summary: Tish Hyman says Alexis Black, formerly Kyle Grant Freeman, was harassing women at Los Angeles Gold's Gym, owned by EōS, before her video of their final encounter went viral.

news.title: Maranacook girls soccer dominates Fort Kent to capture Class C state title

news.title: Penobscot Valley captures 3rd straight Class D girls soccer title
news.summary: Lila Cummings, Rylee Moulton each score goal, add assist to lead Howlers to another Gold Ball.

news.title: Paul Finebaum: Auburn job is a ‘gold mine’; one coach’s name ‘keeps coming up’

news.title: Claressa Shields biopic kicks off African American Film Series at Flint Institute of Arts
news.summary: The film series, presented by Communities First, Inc. in partnership with the Flint Institute of Arts, is starting off its new season on Thursday, Nov. 13, with a showing of The Fire Inside, director Rachel Morrison’s 2024 film focused on the story of two-time Olympic gold medalist and three-division undisputed champion Flint native Claressa Shields.

news.title: Sakamoto shines at NHK Trophy, sets season's highest score
news.summary: Three-times world figure skating champion Kaori Sakamoto of Japan delivered a masterclass to win women's singles gold at the NHK Trophy on Saturday with the world's best score this season.

news.title: Mercury treaty summit criticized for inaction on gold mining crisis
news.summary: By STEVEN GRATTAN BOGOTA, Colombia (AP) — A global mercury conference in Geneva faced sharp criticism Friday from environmental and Indigenous groups for failing to take stronger steps against mercury use in small-scale gold mining. The practice is the world’s largest source of mercury pollution and an increasing threat to the Amazon rainforest. Delegates at […]

news.summary: Amazon’s “elegant and dainty” gold-plated love knot initial bracelet makes for a “meaningful” and “personal” gift. Normally $13, it’s on sale for as low as $8.

news.title: U.S. Olympic gold medalist Hezly Rivera shares her secret to switching her mindset to calm mode before performing
news.summary: “When I’m getting ready, I like to stay as calm as possible. I don’t listen to music, I take a nap. I try to get my mind off gymnastics,” Rivera tells Fortune.

news.title: Stifel Nicolaus Sticks to Their Buy Rating for Montage Gold Corp. (MAU)
news.summary: In a report released yesterday, Cole McGill from Stifel Nicolaus maintained a Buy rating on Montage Gold Corp.. The company’s shares closed yest...
news.full_text:
In a report released yesterday, Cole McGill from Stifel Nicolaus maintained a Buy rating on Montage Gold Corp.. The company’s shares closed yesterday at C$6.70.

Meet Your ETF AI Analyst

Discover how TipRanks' ETF AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions

AI Analyst can help you make smarter investment decisions Explore ETFs TipRanks' users love and see what insights the ETF AI Analyst reveals about the ones you follow.

McGill covers the Basic Materials sector, focusing on stocks such as Foran Mining, FireFly Metals, and Taseko Mines. According to TipRanks, McGill has an average return of 5.0% and a 50.83% success rate on recommended stocks.

The word on The Street in general, suggests a Strong Buy analyst consensus rating for Montage Gold Corp. with a C$8.62 average price target, which is a 28.66% upside from current levels. In a report released on October 28, Raymond James also maintained a Buy rating on the stock with a C$7.50 price target.

Based on Montage Gold Corp.’s latest earnings release for the quarter ending June 30, the company reported a quarterly GAAP net loss of C$14.35 million. In comparison, last year the company had a GAAP net loss of C$11.22 million

Based on the recent corporate insider activity of 15 insiders, corporate insider sentiment is neutral on the stock.

news.title: Padres’ Fernando Tatis Jr. wins second Platinum Glove
news.summary: Padres right fielder has two Platinum Gloves and two Gold Gloves in the last three years

news.title: New research finds eating peanuts can sharpen memory, boost blood flow to the brain
news.summary: A clinical trial found that daily peanut consumption significantly improved verbal memory by 5.8 percent and increased global cerebral blood flow by 3.6 percent in healthy older adults. The findings are from a gold-standard, randomized controlled trial conducted by Maastricht University, providing compelling evidence that the benefits are directly linked to the peanuts. The increased […]

news.title: WWE Championship Changes Hands in SmackDown Stunner
news.summary: A new WWE champion was crowned in a stunning upset on "Friday Night SmackDown," as Chelsea Green pinned Giulia to reclaim gold.

news.title: Class C-1: Milford marches past Malcolm to reach first state championship match
news.summary: Milford is heading to its first gold-medal match after defeating Malcolm in straight sets in a Class C-1 semifinal Friday.

news.title: Why Some Of The World’s Best Gymnasts Will Never Compete For Olympic Gold
news.summary: Led by Ruben Padilla, U.S. trampoline and tumbling gymnasts struck gold in at this week's world championships. However, they will not defend their titles at the 2028 Olympics. Find out why.
